final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style vertical cover image for a 素人 creator post featuring 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" 小红书 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9-grid (九宫格) layout with the product 大疆 Pocket 4 prominently featured at center
Subject: must include a 素人 (everyday person / non-celebrity) creator as the main subject, with 大疆 Pocket 4 as the featured product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a casual, approachable everyday atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that feels fresh and relatable to 小红书 素人 content — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (large, central title, cute and differentiated font style)
Constraints: must be a vertical cover format suited for 小红书; title typography must feel cute (可爱) and visually differentiated from generic fonts
Avoid:
